data.name: NimbRo-OP2: 연구를 위한 3D 프린팅 오픈 성인 크기 휴머노이드 플랫폼
Open-TeleVision: Teleoperation with Immersive Active Visual Feedback
ToddlerBot: Open-Source ML-Compatible Humanoid Platform for Loco-Manipulation
로봇이 로봇을 훈련시킨다: 휴머노이드를 위한 자동 실제 세계 정책 적응 및 학습

data.description: NimbRo-OP2: Grown-up 3D Printed Open Humanoid Platform for Research cites or references ToddlerBot: Open-Source ML-Compatible Humanoid Platform for Loco-Manipulation.
Open-TeleVision: Teleoperation with Immersive Active Visual Feedback cites or references ToddlerBot: Open-Source ML-Compatible Humanoid Platform for Loco-Manipulation.
ToddlerBot: Open-Source ML-Compatible Humanoid Platform for Loco-Manipulation cites or references Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids.
